use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in configuration panels and preferences
Switch between two states such as dark/light mode with animated icon transitions
Enable or disable features, notifications, or app settings
Control visibility of UI elements with smooth spring animations
Use custom icons to represent on/off states in themed interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist animated toggle switch component that accepts custom icons for on/off states. Features smooth spring animations for the sliding thumb and rotation-based icon transitions. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for settings panels, preference toggles, and feature controls across various SaaS and e-commerce applications.
